name: GT-jb-axiom-sq
source: HOS, refs/hos/joa-m.md:2314-2316 (3.1.4, JB algebra norm axioms), VERBATIM: "A JB algebra is a Jordan Banach algebra A in which the norm satisfies the following two additional conditions for $a, b \in A$: (i) $||a^2|| = ||a||^2$, (ii) $||a^2|| \le ||a^2 + b^2||$." V=B(H)_sa is a JB algebra (GT-bhsa from 3.1.2).
